name: Bill O'Connell
abstract: Bill O'Connell (born August 22, 1953, in New York City) is a jazz pianist, educator, and bandleader. He is most associated with Latin jazz and hard bop.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Valentin
about_quotes.evidence: Bill O’Connell, Robby Ameen, Lincoln Goines and Milton Cardona. I believe in family affair. They’ve been with me for more than fifteen years.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Valentin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
